title: Molecular dynamics simulations with grand-canonical reweighting suggest cooperativity effects in RNA structure probing experiments
author: Nicola Calonaci
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Molecular dynamics simulations of an RNA GAAA tetraloop interacting with SHAPE reagent 1-Methyl-7-nitroisatoic anhydride (1m7) in different numer of copies (1 to 19). See also https://arxiv.org/abs/2209.12640 and https://github.com/bussilab/paper-shapemd.
steps_raw: Molecular dynamics simulations of an RNA GAAA tetraloop interacting with SHAPE reagent 1-Methyl-7-nitroisatoic anhydride (1m7) in different numer of copies (1 to 19). See also https://arxiv.org/abs/2209.12640 and https://github.com/bussilab/paper-shapemd.
